data.content: Plan: mirror the scope refinement diagnostics pattern with a stale grooming runtime card; add shared worker-state tracking for active job, completed/failed counts, recent completions, recent failures, and uptime; expose a first-class status route with queue, worker, review, active, failure, and completion data; render the card on the Diagnostics Runtime tab; add hermetic route/unit tests using injected state/store behavior rather than host processes or real fs.
